name: SSC
notes: Disabled: consistently fails from GitHub Actions runner IPs (US/EU egress) — server returns TCP timeout, connection refused, connection reset, or SSL legacy renegotiation refusal. Works fine from Indian residential IPs. Re-enable when running from an Indian-IP cron (local launchd, Oracle Cloud Mumbai, Cloud Run asia-south1) or when a working proxy is wired into the workflow.

name: UPSC
notes: Disabled: consistently fails from GitHub Actions runner IPs (US/EU egress) — server returns TCP timeout, connection refused, connection reset, or SSL legacy renegotiation refusal. Works fine from Indian residential IPs. Re-enable when running from an Indian-IP cron (local launchd, Oracle Cloud Mumbai, Cloud Run asia-south1) or when a working proxy is wired into the workflow.

name: Indian Army (Agniveer)
notes: joinindianarmy.nic.in returns the same 3.4 KB fallback for every public URL — fully auth-walled. indianarmy.nic.in/career/* pages are informational text only (no PDFs or notifications). PIB Defence RSS is broken (returns ErrorPage). Track via Twitter @adgpi, Employment News print/digital, or wait for an official public listing.

name: RRB Chandigarh
notes: Upstream is flaky and slow (responses range 32s–60s+, sometimes outright timeouts). Playwright's Chromium stack hangs on this host even at 90s — curl is the only reliable path. Static HTML already contains the digialm.com form links, no JS hydration needed.

name: RPSC
notes: Disabled: consistently fails from GitHub Actions runner IPs (US/EU egress) — server returns TCP timeout, connection refused, connection reset, or SSL legacy renegotiation refusal. Works fine from Indian residential IPs. Re-enable when running from an Indian-IP cron (local launchd, Oracle Cloud Mumbai, Cloud Run asia-south1) or when a working proxy is wired into the workflow.

name: TNPSC
notes: TNPSC's homepage HTML wraps all current recruitment items inside non-standard <!--- HTML comments, hiding them from cheerio AND browsers. Site appears intentionally minimised. Re-enable when their CMS publishes notifications normally.

name: MPSC (Maharashtra)
notes: MPSC actively encrypts API responses (getcontentdata/8 returns base64 ciphertext) and renders decrypted content in a way that doesn't expose anchors even after 15s Playwright wait. Genuinely scrape-resistant. Workaround: monitor Maharashtra Employment News or commercial aggregators for MPSC.

name: NVS (Navodaya)
notes: NVS Recruitment/Notification-Vacancies page renders 0 useful PDF anchors after Playwright + 5s wait. Page appears to load notifications via further interaction. Re-investigate by inspecting DOM structure for tab-clicks or a deeper sub-route.

name: UPSSSC
notes: UPSSSC's notification listing has each notice as <a href='AllNotifications.aspx' title='<full-text>'> — same href for every notice, with the unique title in the title attribute. Engine currently dedupes by href, so all notices collapse to one entry. Needs a 'dedupe by aria-label/title attribute' option to onboard.

name: BSF
notes: BSF wraps all 15 recruitment PDF anchors inside <!-- HTML comments --> (balanced 16/16). Browsers and cheerio both treat them as comments — same issue as TNPSC. Re-enable when BSF un-comments active recruitments on the homepage.

name: CISF
notes: cisfrectt.cisf.gov.in serves a JS-only fingerprint-verification page (custom bot detection). Even Playwright loads only the loader. Needs cookie-handshake replay (Fingerprint.start → /__verify/fp endpoint) to pass — currently out of scope. Try the parent www.cisf.gov.in/recruitment instead.

name: ITBP
notes: Disabled: consistently fails from GitHub Actions runner IPs (US/EU egress) — server returns TCP timeout, connection refused, connection reset, or SSL legacy renegotiation refusal. Works fine from Indian residential IPs. Re-enable when running from an Indian-IP cron (local launchd, Oracle Cloud Mumbai, Cloud Run asia-south1) or when a working proxy is wired into the workflow.

name: RRB Mumbai
notes: rrbmumbai.gov.in returns hostname/cert mismatch. Even with ignoreHTTPSErrors + Playwright, homepage and /notice.php expose 0 recruitment PDFs and 0 digialm links — site has no current active CENs publicly listed. Re-investigate when RRB Mumbai posts new CENs (look for a /employment-notices analog).

name: Delhi Police
notes: Delhi Police recruitments.aspx page shows only departmental docs (Citizen_Charter, DAR, Athletics) — no actual recruitment notifications. Per the xlsx note, Delhi Police hires via SSC (already monitored) + dept-specific channels. Use SSC + DSSSB (already monitored) instead.

name: APPSC (Andhra)
notes: APPSC homepage and Playwright-rendered DOM both expose 0 PDFs / notification anchors. Fully SPA-driven with no scrapable listing endpoint. Re-investigate by intercepting API calls in DevTools to find the recruitment data endpoint.

name: Assam Rifles
notes: Assam Rifles is an Angular SPA. Recruitments live behind a JSON-body POST: POST https://assamrifles.gov.in/api/recruitment with body {"eventID":"1004","addInfo":{}}. Returns 14+ items with CONTENT_ID + SUBJECT + DATE but no direct PDF URL (PDFs are served via app-internal route via CONTENT_ID). Engine currently does not support JSON-body POST (formData is multipart only). Onboard once engine supports POST with bodyJson, OR resolve CONTENT_ID->PDF download URL pattern.

name: NSG
notes: NSG /media-centre/vacancies page renders a single "Coming Soon" panel — there are no public vacancy notifications on the website. NSG hires senior officers on deputation from Army/CAPFs (not via open recruitment). Re-investigate if NSG ever publishes direct intake notifications.

name: MES (Defence)
notes: mes.gov.in serves a 502 Bad Gateway on every URL tried (/, /career, /recruitment-cell, /recruitments). Server appears to be persistently down or behind a broken upstream. MES recruits Group-B/C posts via UPSC/SSC — already monitored. Re-enable when site comes back online.

name: Rajasthan Police
notes: Rajasthan Police runs an Angular SPA at police.rajasthan.gov.in/portal/ that exposes 0 public anchors (only 6 anchors: language toggles + Play Store). Recruitment for Rajasthan Police constables/SI is conducted by RSMSSB/RPSC (already monitored). Old portal at www.police.rajasthan.gov.in/old/ has no public recruitment listing either.

name: UPSC Online
notes: upsconline.gov.in is now a frozen archive (notice on page: 'only for preview of application forms filled/submitted on or before 25/03/2025'). Active portal upsconline.nic.in is an Angular SPA that only lists exam application forms, not recruitment notifications. Redundant with the existing 'upsc' source (upsc.gov.in/whats-new) which already has the recruitment ads.

name: CSIR HRDG
notes: CSIR HRDG /Notice page hosts only fellowship-administration OMs (transfers, contingency-claim formats, fellowship guidelines) — not direct recruitment ads. The fellowship intake itself is via JRF-NET (NTA-conducted) and JRF-GATE, both already covered by the 'nta' source. Re-enable if HRDG starts publishing direct recruitment for HRDG cadre staff.

name: Coal India
notes: Disabled: CloudFront WAF rejects all datacenter ASNs (AWS, Azure, GCP, Oracle Cloud) with HTTP 403. Only residential Indian ISP connections work. Use freejobalert as a substitute aggregator.

name: PGCIL (Powergrid)
notes: Disabled: consistently fails from GitHub Actions runner IPs (US/EU egress) — server returns TCP timeout, connection refused, connection reset, or SSL legacy renegotiation refusal. Works fine from Indian residential IPs. Re-enable when running from an Indian-IP cron (local launchd, Oracle Cloud Mumbai, Cloud Run asia-south1) or when a working proxy is wired into the workflow.

name: BSNL
notes: BSNL's main site (www.bsnl.co.in) has been rebuilt as a chatbot-only React SPA. The legacy /opencms/.../recruitment.html URL is reachable (200) but body is essentially empty (7KB shell). Modern routes like /recruitment return 404. No public recruitment listing exists. BSNL recruitment notices appear in Employment News (already covered) and via DoT's all-vacancies page; rely on those.

name: NHM (Central)
notes: Central nhm.gov.in is policy/programme content only — no Recruitment, Vacancy, Career, or Notice anchors of any kind. NHM hires happen through state-level NHM portals (UP NRHM, Bihar SHS, MP NHM etc.), each with its own URL. Treat NHM as a parent ministry; track state-NHM portals separately if needed.

name: NCERT
notes: Disabled: consistently fails from GitHub Actions runner IPs (US/EU egress) — server returns TCP timeout, connection refused, connection reset, or SSL legacy renegotiation refusal. Works fine from Indian residential IPs. Re-enable when running from an Indian-IP cron (local launchd, Oracle Cloud Mumbai, Cloud Run asia-south1) or when a working proxy is wired into the workflow.

name: UGC
notes: Disabled: CloudFront WAF rejects all datacenter ASNs (AWS, Azure, GCP, Oracle Cloud) with HTTP 403. Only residential Indian ISP connections work. Use freejobalert as a substitute aggregator.

name: AICTE
notes: Old aicte-india.org domain redirects to aicte.gov.in. Dedicated /opportunities/jobs and /opportunities/recruitment pages have only initiative PDFs. Vacancy circulars surfaced on homepage carousel + facilities.aicte-india.org subdomain.

name: NCS Portal
notes: NCS publishes a 'What's New' news feed at the betacloud subdomain. Server returns XML when Accept: text/html is sent (default), so we force Accept: application/json via useCurl + headers. newsUrl is a presigned Azure blob URL — stripQuery dedupes when the SAS token rotates.

name: Employment News
notes: Aggregator: Employment News re-publishes weekly recruitment ads from many central govt sources. High coverage but high redundancy with already-monitored sources.

name: Sarkari Result
notes: Disabled: CloudFront WAF rejects all datacenter ASNs (AWS, Azure, GCP, Oracle Cloud) with HTTP 403. Only residential Indian ISP connections work. Use freejobalert as a substitute aggregator.

name: FreeJobAlert
notes: Third-party aggregator. Fetched via Google News sitemap (flat list of recent articles). URL format: /articles/{slug}-{numeric-id}. Replaces sarkariresult.com which is unreachable from any datacenter (CloudFront WAF).
